title: Feur Pet Hat
description: A small mod that adds animal-shaped hats
body:
A small mod that adds animal-shaped hats

It is not yet planned to be compatible with **Curios**, it is a mod for a small modpack between friends that I share with you.
You can use it in your modpacks as long as the mod link and my credit are present.


~


To obtain the hats, you must speak to a **_fisherman villager_** who now has new offers ! :)

Then right-click with your hat to put it on your head _( classic i know )_.

I will patch soon the bug that you can't drop the hat directly into the head-slot !
